# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: app-storage-bucket
  type: gcp-types/storage-v1:buckets
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-app-bucket
    project: $(project)
    location: US-CENTRAL1
    storageClass: STANDARD
    versioning:
      enabled: true

- name: app-sql-instance
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-sql-instance
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_14
    region: us-central1
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        requireSsl: false
        authorizedNetworks:
          - value: 0.0.0.0/0 # WARNING: For demo/MVP purposes. Restrict in production!
            name: public
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: false # For MySQL, not PostgreSQL
        startTime: 03:00
      locationPreference:
        zone: us-central1-a
      diskSize: 20
      diskType: PD_SSD
      storageAutoResize: true

- name: app-sql-database
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:databases
  properties:
    name: app_database
    instance: $(ref:app-sql-instance.name)
    charset: UTF8

- name: app-sql-user
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:users
  properties:
    name: app_user
    host: '%'
    instance: $(ref:app-sql-instance.name)
    password: YOUR_SECURE_PASSWORD # Replace with a strong password or secret manager reference

- name: app-instance-template
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:instanceTemplates
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-instance-template
    project: $(project)
    properties:
      machineType: e2-micro
      disks:
        - deviceName: boot
          type: PERSISTENT
          boot: true
          autoDelete: true
          initializeParams:
            sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-11
            diskSizeGb: 10
      networkInterfaces:
        - network: global/networks/default
          accessConfigs:
            - name: External NAT
              type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
      serviceAccounts:
        - email: $(projectNumber)-compute@developer.gserviceaccount.com
          scopes:
            - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform # Broad scope for MVP, restrict in production
      metadata:
        items:
          - key: startup-script
            value: |
              #!/bin/bash
              sudo apt-get update
              sudo apt-get install -y nginx
              sudo echo "Hello from $(hostname) in $(gcloud compute instances describe $(hostname) --zone $(gcloud config get-value compute/zone) --format='value(zone)')!" | sudo tee /var/www/html/index.nginx-debian.html
              sudo systemctl start nginx

- name: app-instance-group-manager
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:regionInstanceGroupManagers
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-mig
    region: us-central1
    instanceTemplate: $(ref:app-instance-template.selfLink)
    baseInstanceName: $(deployment)-app
    targetSize: 2 # Number of instances in the group

- name: app-firewall-http
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:firewalls
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-firewall-http
    network: global/networks/default
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - '80'
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0 # Allow HTTP from anywhere (for LB)

- name: app-firewall-health-check
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:firewalls
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-firewall-health-check
    network: global/networks/default
    direction: INGRESS
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - '80'
    sourceRanges:
      - 130.211.0.0/22
      - 35.191.0.0/16
    targetTags:
      - http-server # Assuming your MIG instances have this tag, or allow all instances

- name: app-health-check
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:healthChecks
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-health-check
    type: HTTP
    requestPath: /
    port: 80
    checkIntervalSec: 5
    timeoutSec: 5
    unhealthyThreshold: 2
    healthyThreshold: 2

- name: app-backend-service
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:backendServices
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-backend-service
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    healthChecks:
      - $(ref:app-health-check.selfLink)
    backends:
      - group: $(ref:app-instance-group-manager.instanceGroup)
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL_MANAGED
    localityLbPolicy: ROUND_ROBIN

- name: app-url-map
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:urlMaps
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-url-map
    defaultService: $(ref:app-backend-service.selfLink)

- name: app-target-http-proxy
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:targetHttpProxies
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-target-http-proxy
    urlMap: $(ref:app-url-map.selfLink)

- name: app-global-forwarding-rule
  type: gcp-types/compute-v1:globalForwardingRules
  properties:
    name: $(deployment)-forwarding-rule
    portRange: '80'
    target: $(ref:app-target-http-proxy.selfLink)
    loadBalancingScheme: EXTERNAL_MANAGED

outputs:
  - name: storageBucketName
    value: $(ref:app-storage-bucket.name)
  - name: sqlInstanceConnectionName
    value: $(ref:app-sql-instance.connectionName)
  - name: appLoadBalancerIP
    value: $(ref:app-global-forwarding-rule.IPAddress)
